name: hidao80-plugins
description: Plugins for AI coding agents developed by hidao80.

plugins.name: post-chatwork
plugins.description: A Claude Code skill plugin for posting messages and files to Chatwork.

plugins.name: code-analyze
plugins.description: Record and update project documentation in a readable state for both humans and AI.

plugins.name: modernize-repo
plugins.description: Modernize your repository with Docker, CI/CD, and README updates for JavaScript, Python and PHP.

plugins.name: sbi-feedback
plugins.description: Provide structured positive feedback for work reports using the SBI (Situation, Behavior, Impact) feedback framework.

plugins.name: security-audit
plugins.description: Checks the security of a repository. Use when investigating external communications, data storage, third-party libraries, or security risks. Use cases: security audits, vulnerability checks, privacy verification, or investigating external communications.
